style_effects: Glowing molten lava cracks radiate from Chansey's body, emitting intense heat shimmer that distorts the air around it; ember sparks float upward in erratic bursts, leaving faint smoke trails that dissipate into the air. Its aura pulses with a deep crimson hue, casting a warm amber glow that illuminates the surroundings with a fiery intensity. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
